base_url.description: YouTube Data API root. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

api_key.description: YouTube Data API key, sent as the 'key' query parameter on every request. Never logged.

channel_ids.description: Comma-separated channel IDs, sent as the 'id' query parameter for the 'channels' stream. Omitted entirely when unset.

ids.description: Comma-separated video/playlist IDs, sent as the 'id' query parameter for the 'videos' and 'playlists' streams. Omitted entirely when unset.

playlist_ids.description: Comma-separated playlist IDs to fan out over for the 'playlist_items' stream (one request sequence per id, stamped onto every emitted record's playlist_id field). Required for that stream to emit anything; a full-refresh read with this unset simply yields zero playlist_items records.

video_ids.description: Comma-separated video IDs to fan out over for the 'comment_threads' stream (one request sequence per id, stamped onto every emitted record's video_id field). Required for that stream to emit anything; a full-refresh read with this unset simply yields zero comment_threads records.

search_query.description: Search term for the 'search' stream's 'q' query parameter. Omitted entirely when unset (an unfiltered public-content search).

region_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code for the 'video_categories' stream (YouTube's video category list is region-scoped; there is no all-regions listing).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
